name: Football Pro: American League VR Edition

reviews.review_description:
It’s the worst game ever I tried to play a real match but it only lets you practice.

                    WORST GAME EVER IN THE WORLD!

developer_response.body:
THANK YOU!!!! All feedback is appreciated.
This game is a free demo - to test out the throwing physics and check out - if people want and need a football game out there.
We are starting the development this year.
Check our Baseball game that already have the multiplayer mode if you keen.
If you could possible - MAYBE - consider giving  the game 5/5 - that would help and fuel the development :) It would help us put more resources into that game.

reviews.review_title: Promising Start for VR American Football
reviews.review_description:
Football Pro: American League VR Edition is already impressive in its alpha version. The game offers multiple modes, from simple practice drills to throwing at static targets and chasing high scores on moving ones. The physics feel spot-on, giving you a real appreciation for how tough it is to throw long and accurately in American football.

The cherry on top: multiplayer is on the way. It’s not yet clear whether that means competing head-to-head or actually passing and receiving the ball, but either option would take the immersion to the next level.

A very solid foundation — definitely a title to keep a close eye on as it develops.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much - we are really focused on the baseball game lately :)) but as soon as we are settled there we are going back to the footbal!!

Hello Dear Pumpkin.
The only way for us to grow those games - is to grow their chances on the store - via getting some good rates  and positioning ^^
The focus goes to the game which people like the best.
If you want to see more updates - help us with good rating to position the game higher.

developer_response.body:
Haha, god.
We understand - but we can tell you simply - the more 5 stars - the more focus we can put to make the game grow.
Only the rating - can make the game stand out enough, to make it grow amazing.
Focus goes - to where audience is. Our only chance to break through 💪
We appreciate any help.
